name: Nashor's Tooth

passives.name: Icathian Bite
passives.effects: Basic attacks deal {{as|15 {{as|(+ 15% AP)}} '''bonus''' magic damage|magic damage}} [[on-hit]].

effects_structured.raw: Basic attacks deal 15 (+15% AP) bonus magic damage on-hit.

simpleDescription: Increases Attack Speed, Ability Power, and Cooldown Reduction

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model: Icathian Bite adds bonus magic on-hit damage to each basic attack hit.
Timing note: bonus damage resolves on hit with attack cadence and scales from current ability power.
